subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou beholdest the sincere ones and the monotheists amidst the ungodly, and the lovers amidst the hostile ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تری المخلصین و الموحدین بین المشرکین و المحبین بین المعاندین و
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for forgiveness
